deskripsi: Learn the basics of Python programming, including data types, control flow, and functions.
Dive deep into JavaScript concepts like asynchronous programming, closures, and modern frameworks.
Explore data analysis, visualization, and machine learning using Python libraries like Pandas, NumPy, and Scikit-learn.
Build dynamic web applications from front-end to back-end using modern technologies.
Master the React library for building interactive user interfaces.
Develop robust server-side applications with Node.js and Express.
Create cross-platform mobile applications using the Flutter framework.
Understand the fundamentals of cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.
Learn principles and practices for continuous integration and continuous delivery.
Introduction to cybersecurity concepts, threats, and defense mechanisms.
Build and deploy machine learning models in production environments.
Explore the core concepts of artificial intelligence and its applications.
Learn to design, query, and manage relational databases using SQL.
Understand and implement databases like MongoDB and Cassandra.
Create 2D and 3D games using the Unity game engine and C#.
Learn the fundamentals of user interface and user experience design.
Understand and apply agile methodologies for software development projects.
Learn to create clear and effective technical documentation.
Develop skills for analyzing business needs and recommending solutions.
Learn to design and execute software tests to ensure quality.
